title: xanthophyllum pedicellatum
intro: Xanthophyllum pedicellatum is a species of plant in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as a type of flowering shrub or tree native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum pedicellatum include its ability to treat various skin conditions, such as wounds, eczema, and acne, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The plant is traditionally prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
